item.title: BMW M5 Touring Review: The 727 HP Super-Wagon Reborn
item.description: BMW has resurrected the super-wagon, and this time it brings a plug. The new M5 Touring pairs a twin-turbo V8 with an electric motor for a combined 727 horsepower, channelled through an xDrive system that finally resolves the old car’s traction problem.

item.title: Mercedes-AMG GT 63 S E Performance Becomes Most Powerful AMG Ever
item.description: Mercedes-AMG has crowned the new GT lineup with the 63 S E Performance, a plug-in hybrid flagship packing a combined 831 horsepower.

item.title: Porsche Taycan Turbo S Review: The Electric Benchmark, Sharpened
item.description: Porsche’s mid-cycle refresh gives the Taycan a meaningful bump in range and charging speed, plus cabin tech that finally feels current. The Turbo S, the flagship, remains the benchmark others chase.

item.title: Best Hot Hatches of 2026: Affordable Performance, Ranked
item.description: Reports of the hot hatch’s death have been exaggerated. The format has shifted â€” hybrid, electrified, occasionally crossover-shaped â€” but the recipe of practicality plus performance is alive and well.
